title: FLASH LIQUID ALL PURPOSE APPLE BLOSSOM 1L
features: Removes 100% of Dirt, Grease & Grime – Powerful formula cuts through tough messes, leaving surfaces spotless. ​
Antibacterial Protection – Kills 99.9% of bacteria and viruses, ensuring a hygienic clean. ​
Long-Lasting Apple Blossom Fragrance – Infused with essential oils, it leaves your home smelling fresh and clean. ​
Multi-Surface Cleaning – Suitable for floors, worktops, sinks, and bathroom surfaces. ​
No Harsh Residues – Leaves surfaces shiny without sticky or slippery residues. ​
description: Product Description Flash All Purpose Cleaner Apple Blossom 1L is a versatile cleaning solution designed to tackle dirt, grease, and grime across various surfaces in your home. Its powerful antibacterial formula eliminates 99.9% of bacteria and viruses, ensuring a hygienic environment. Infused with the delightful scent of apple blossom and essential oils, it leaves your home smelling fresh and clean. Ideal for use on floors, worktops, sinks, and bathroom surfaces, this cleaner provides a sparkling finish without leaving any harsh residues. ​ Ingredients <5% Anionic surfactants, Non-ionic surfactants; Perfumes, Hexyl cinnamal, Linalool, Rose Ketones, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes. UFI: KNVJ-S0DH-1008-1A1M. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP, UK See more
